today_focus.title: Anthropic：Reverse engineering APIs through network requests is one of the most fun things you can do with Claude Code to automate tasks..
today_focus.brief: Reverse engineering APIs through network requests is one of the most fun things you can do with Claude Code to automate tasks.。看点在产品自动化：能不能把工具调用、权限和结果校验做成可靠闭环。
today_focus.social_original_text:
Reverse engineering APIs through network requests is one of the most fun things you can do with Claude Code to automate tasks..

SO many websites are impossible to navigate "deterministically" via the DOM (or through screenshots).

So, I just point Claude Code to use browser_harness by @browser_use (or vanilla playwright) and ask it to sniff network requests on the pages that I'm trying to get info on.

And, I just keep clicking around on the sections of data that I want. And, then Claude Code is generally able to go through the logs to figure out what is the right structure for these APIs and what kind of auth do they need (most are cookie based). We also determine what kind of rate limits exist based on trial and error.

I'm able to use that to construct jobs that allow me to get that data programmatically. There are many use cases for this besides scraping. I use this for random side projects (like the travel CLI), for monitoring websites (for intel), and for many many other use cases.

Every website will soon need to be headless, and we'll need to figure out mechanisms for how we have our agents pay these websites programmatically as well.

Just as we have llms.txt for data and structure, we'll soon need tools.txt for agents to determine what tools exist that can be leveraged.
today_focus.translation_zh: 通过网络请求逆向 API，是用 Claude Code 实现任务自动化最有趣的方式之一。 太多网站根本无法通过 DOM（或截图）进行“确定性”导航。 因此，我直接让 Claude Code 调用 @browser_use 的 browser_harness（或原生 playwright），在目标页面上嗅探网络请求。 我只需在所需数据区域随意点击，Claude Code 就能通过分析日志，理清 API 的正确结构及认证方式（多为 Cookie 认证）。我们还会通过试错摸清速率限制。 借此，我可以构建自动化任务来编程获取数据。除爬虫外，用途广泛：我将其用于各类副业项目（如 travel CLI）、网站监控（情报收集）等众多场景。 未来每个网站都将需要支持无头（headless）模式，我们还需探索让 AI 代理以编程方式向网站付费的机制。 正如我们已有规范数据与结构的 llms.txt，很快我们也将需要 tools.txt，供代理识别并调用可用工具。
evidence_titles: Reverse engineering APIs through network requests is one of the most fun things you can do with Claude Code to automate tasks..
evidence_summaries:
Reverse engineering APIs through network requests is one of the most fun things you can do with Claude Code to automate tasks..

SO many websites are impossible to navigate "deterministically" via the DOM (or through screenshots).

So, I just point Claude Code to use browser_harness by @browser_use (or vanilla playwright) and ask it to sniff network requests on the pages that I'm trying to get info on.

And, I just keep clicking around on the sections of data that I want. And, then Claude Code is generally able to go through the logs to figure out what is the right structure for these APIs and what kind of auth do they need (most are cookie based). We also determine what kind of rate limits exist based on trial and error.

I'm able to use that to construct jobs that allow me to get that data programmatically. There are many use cases for this besides scraping. I use this for random side projects (like the travel CLI), for monitoring websites (for intel), and for many many other use cases.

Every website will soon need to be headless, and we'll need to figure out mechanisms for how we have our agents pay these websites programmatically as well.

Just as we have llms.txt for data and structure, we'll soon need tools.txt for agents to determine what tools exist that can be leveraged.

industry_views.title: Anthropic：Reverse engineering APIs through network requests is one of the most fun things you can do with Claude Code to automate tasks..
industry_views.brief: Reverse engineering APIs through network requests is one of the most fun things you can do with Claude Code to automate tasks.。看点在产品自动化：能不能把工具调用、权限和结果校验做成可靠闭环。
industry_views.social_original_text:
Reverse engineering APIs through network requests is one of the most fun things you can do with Claude Code to automate tasks..

SO many websites are impossible to navigate "deterministically" via the DOM (or through screenshots).

So, I just point Claude Code to use browser_harness by @browser_use (or vanilla playwright) and ask it to sniff network requests on the pages that I'm trying to get info on.

And, I just keep clicking around on the sections of data that I want. And, then Claude Code is generally able to go through the logs to figure out what is the right structure for these APIs and what kind of auth do they need (most are cookie based). We also determine what kind of rate limits exist based on trial and error.

I'm able to use that to construct jobs that allow me to get that data programmatically. There are many use cases for this besides scraping. I use this for random side projects (like the travel CLI), for monitoring websites (for intel), and for many many other use cases.

Every website will soon need to be headless, and we'll need to figure out mechanisms for how we have our agents pay these websites programmatically as well.

Just as we have llms.txt for data and structure, we'll soon need tools.txt for agents to determine what tools exist that can be leveraged.
industry_views.translation_zh: 通过网络请求逆向 API，是用 Claude Code 实现任务自动化最有趣的方式之一。 太多网站根本无法通过 DOM（或截图）进行“确定性”导航。 因此，我直接让 Claude Code 调用 @browser_use 的 browser_harness（或原生 playwright），在目标页面上嗅探网络请求。 我只需在所需数据区域随意点击，Claude Code 就能通过分析日志，理清 API 的正确结构及认证方式（多为 Cookie 认证）。我们还会通过试错摸清速率限制。 借此，我可以构建自动化任务来编程获取数据。除爬虫外，用途广泛：我将其用于各类副业项目（如 travel CLI）、网站监控（情报收集）等众多场景。 未来每个网站都将需要支持无头（headless）模式，我们还需探索让 AI 代理以编程方式向网站付费的机制。 正如我们已有规范数据与结构的 llms.txt，很快我们也将需要 tools.txt，供代理识别并调用可用工具。
evidence_titles: Reverse engineering APIs through network requests is one of the most fun things you can do with Claude Code to automate tasks..
evidence_summaries:
Reverse engineering APIs through network requests is one of the most fun things you can do with Claude Code to automate tasks..

SO many websites are impossible to navigate "deterministically" via the DOM (or through screenshots).

So, I just point Claude Code to use browser_harness by @browser_use (or vanilla playwright) and ask it to sniff network requests on the pages that I'm trying to get info on.

And, I just keep clicking around on the sections of data that I want. And, then Claude Code is generally able to go through the logs to figure out what is the right structure for these APIs and what kind of auth do they need (most are cookie based). We also determine what kind of rate limits exist based on trial and error.

I'm able to use that to construct jobs that allow me to get that data programmatically. There are many use cases for this besides scraping. I use this for random side projects (like the travel CLI), for monitoring websites (for intel), and for many many other use cases.

Every website will soon need to be headless, and we'll need to figure out mechanisms for how we have our agents pay these websites programmatically as well.

Just as we have llms.txt for data and structure, we'll soon need tools.txt for agents to determine what tools exist that can be leveraged.

items.title: DVAO: Dynamic Variance-adaptive Advantage Optimization for Multi-reward Reinforcement Learning
items.title_zh: DVAO: 面向多奖励强化学习的动态方差自适应优势优化
items.takeaway_zh: 提出DVAO算法，通过动态根据奖励方差调整多目标权重，解决多奖励强化学习中的训练不稳定问题。
items.why_it_matters_zh: 为大模型多目标对齐提供更稳定的优化方案，显著提升复杂任务下的训练收敛性与综合性能。

items.title: Macaron-A2UI: A Model for Generative UI in Personal Agents
items.title_zh: Macaron-A2UI: 面向个人智能体的生成式UI模型
items.takeaway_zh: 发布Macaron-A2UI模型，使智能体能动态生成可执行UI控件，突破纯文本交互瓶颈。
items.why_it_matters_zh: 推动智能体从纯文本向可视化交互演进，为构建下一代具备图形界面生成能力的个人助手提供基座。

items.title: WBench: A Comprehensive Multi-turn Benchmark for Interactive Video World Model Evaluation
items.title_zh: WBench：交互式视频世界模型综合多轮评测基准
items.takeaway_zh: 提出WBench基准，从五大维度系统评估交互式视频世界模型的多轮交互与物理一致性能力。
items.why_it_matters_zh: 填补统一评测空白，为视频世界模型的能力诊断与迭代提供标准化基础设施。

items.title: AutoResearch AI: Towards AI-Powered Research Automation for Scientific Discovery
items.title_zh: AutoResearch AI：迈向AI驱动的科研自动化
items.takeaway_zh: 综述AI科研自动化演进路径，界定人机协同至AI主导的工作流框架及现存技术瓶颈。
items.why_it_matters_zh: 明确科研Agent在证据留存、可复现性与问责机制上的关键挑战，指引自动化科研基建方向。

items.title: Your Embedding Model is SMARTer Than You Think
items.title_zh: 你的嵌入模型比你想象的更聪明
items.takeaway_zh: 提出SMART框架，通过推理阶段对单向量模型的冻结隐藏状态进行晚期交互，免训练即提升多模态检索性能。
items.why_it_matters_zh: 为现有检索模型提供即插即用的低成本升级方案，显著节省算力并突破多模态检索性能瓶颈。

items.title: Anthropic：Reverse engineering APIs through network requests is one of the most fun things you can do with Claude Code to automate tasks..
items.brief: Reverse engineering APIs through network requests is one of the most fun things you can do with Claude Code to automate tasks.。看点在产品自动化：能不能把工具调用、权限和结果校验做成可靠闭环。
items.social_original_text:
Reverse engineering APIs through network requests is one of the most fun things you can do with Claude Code to automate tasks..

SO many websites are impossible to navigate "deterministically" via the DOM (or through screenshots).

So, I just point Claude Code to use browser_harness by @browser_use (or vanilla playwright) and ask it to sniff network requests on the pages that I'm trying to get info on.

And, I just keep clicking around on the sections of data that I want. And, then Claude Code is generally able to go through the logs to figure out what is the right structure for these APIs and what kind of auth do they need (most are cookie based). We also determine what kind of rate limits exist based on trial and error.

I'm able to use that to construct jobs that allow me to get that data programmatically. There are many use cases for this besides scraping. I use this for random side projects (like the travel CLI), for monitoring websites (for intel), and for many many other use cases.

Every website will soon need to be headless, and we'll need to figure out mechanisms for how we have our agents pay these websites programmatically as well.

Just as we have llms.txt for data and structure, we'll soon need tools.txt for agents to determine what tools exist that can be leveraged.
items.translation_zh: 通过网络请求逆向 API，是用 Claude Code 实现任务自动化最有趣的方式之一。 太多网站根本无法通过 DOM（或截图）进行“确定性”导航。 因此，我直接让 Claude Code 调用 @browser_use 的 browser_harness（或原生 playwright），在目标页面上嗅探网络请求。 我只需在所需数据区域随意点击，Claude Code 就能通过分析日志，理清 API 的正确结构及认证方式（多为 Cookie 认证）。我们还会通过试错摸清速率限制。 借此，我可以构建自动化任务来编程获取数据。除爬虫外，用途广泛：我将其用于各类副业项目（如 travel CLI）、网站监控（情报收集）等众多场景。 未来每个网站都将需要支持无头（headless）模式，我们还需探索让 AI 代理以编程方式向网站付费的机制。 正如我们已有规范数据与结构的 llms.txt，很快我们也将需要 tools.txt，供代理识别并调用可用工具。
evidence_titles: Reverse engineering APIs through network requests is one of the most fun things you can do with Claude Code to automate tasks..
evidence_summaries:
Reverse engineering APIs through network requests is one of the most fun things you can do with Claude Code to automate tasks..

SO many websites are impossible to navigate "deterministically" via the DOM (or through screenshots).

So, I just point Claude Code to use browser_harness by @browser_use (or vanilla playwright) and ask it to sniff network requests on the pages that I'm trying to get info on.

And, I just keep clicking around on the sections of data that I want. And, then Claude Code is generally able to go through the logs to figure out what is the right structure for these APIs and what kind of auth do they need (most are cookie based). We also determine what kind of rate limits exist based on trial and error.

I'm able to use that to construct jobs that allow me to get that data programmatically. There are many use cases for this besides scraping. I use this for random side projects (like the travel CLI), for monitoring websites (for intel), and for many many other use cases.

Every website will soon need to be headless, and we'll need to figure out mechanisms for how we have our agents pay these websites programmatically as well.

Just as we have llms.txt for data and structure, we'll soon need tools.txt for agents to determine what tools exist that can be leveraged.
